scheme_name: Rajasthan Chief Minister’s Relief Fund – Medical Help
description: Financial assistance for medical treatment of serious diseases and special medical conditions.
benefits: Up to ₹1.5 lakh in government hospitals
Up to ₹90,000 in recognized private hospitals
Special assistance for cancer, cochlear implant, thalassemia
eligibility: Not covered under Ayushman Bharat Rajasthan

steps: Apply via CM Relief Fund portal

additional_notes: Funds are transferred directly to hospital or beneficiary.
